title: Error reading properties of undefined in HTTP request
symptom: When attempting to send an HTTP request with an XML file, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '#>Object> ')'.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the code attempts to access a property of an object that is not defined. In the context of sending an XML file, it may indicate that the file or its properties are not being correctly referenced or passed in the workflow.
fix_steps: Ensure the XML file is correctly attached in the HTTP request node
Check the variable names and ensure they match the expected structure
If using a Code node, verify that the output is correctly formatted as binary
agent_instruction: Verify the attachment of the XML file in the HTTP request node and check variable references.
